title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside Model Optimization by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AWQ (Activation-aware Weight Quantization)
steps.summary: ** AWQ (Activation-aware Weight Quantization) belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after weight quantization and activation quantization.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Pruning
steps.summary: Reducing the size of a neural network by removing redundant or unnecessary weights. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Compare it with Model Pruning and Weight Pruning. It opens into Pre-Pruning and Diff Pruning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Quantization
steps.summary: Representing neural network weights and activations using fewer bits, often for deployment on resource-constrained devices. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Compare it with Model Quantization and weight quantization. It opens into NF4 quantization and fp16 quantization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: token pruning
steps.summary: token pruning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Pruning and Model Pruning. It opens into Adaptive Token Pruning and Variational Token Pruning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Weight Pruning
steps.summary: Weight Pruning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Pruning and Model Pruning. It opens into Weight Pruning Extensions and Weight Pruning Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: self-distillation
steps.summary: self-distillation belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Distillation and Model Distillation. It opens into Self-Distillation (KD-T) and Self-Distillation (KD-L2).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Heuristic Pruning
steps.summary: Heuristic Pruning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Pruning and Model Pruning. It opens into Dependency Pruning Heuristic and Heuristic Pruning Strategies.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Memory Compression
steps.summary: Memory Compression belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Model Compression and Memory network. It opens into Memory-Compression Transformers and Memory Compression Cognitive Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
